termlists._comment: There is no Norwegian translation of the search term coal as it only returns noise, not really a common fuel in Norway
Not an issue in Norwegian as olje is normally used as part of another word (e.g. olivenolje)
As energy intensity is such a specialized term, we found it sufficient to search for it alone in the title search.

In this phrase, searching with the same phrases and limitations as in Web of Science was quite restrictive. We therefore chose to simplify the search and accept a combination of energy consum and econom or GDP in the title as sufficient to be included(without decoupling)

phrases._comment: We have two searches in the original file. logic_rule is for title and abstract search, this is for title search only: ([termlist7_3standalone] | ([termlist7_3e] & [termlist7_3f]) | ([termlist7_3g] & [termlist7_3h]))

termlists._comment: A direct translation of the Web of Science search into Norwegian language gave barely any results. We therefore allowed a few terms for energy efficiency and energy saving in Norwegian to stand alone in order to capture some more relevant titles. This was not done in english because it is poor precision.

phrases._comment: We have simplified the search as we are only searching titles, and left out specific energy terms. All that is required now is terms for energy efficien combined with sufficien, or the title to contain energy suffici*
